creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #5)

Checked out the kernels of all boxes I have access to and restored FBSD-11 compatibility. Now, on the hosts in question, the influxd daemon starts without problems. Thank you very much.

XigmaNAS boxes are leftover, either I'm mistaken and picked up a wrong box, or, in case that's the project's intention, I'll check with XigmaNAS upstream there.

Anyway, thank you very much.
Regards
oh
